programme.title: Earthrise S1 - "Plastic Into Products"
programme.desc: We meet enviro-entrepreneurs who recycle plastic waste to produce a large variety of items from fishing boats to coffee cups.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Miami Beach Underwater"
programme.desc: As scientific studies confirm sea level changes throught the globe, major coastal cities like Miami are now fighting back against these rising tides, before it's too late. Parts of Miami Beach are under serious threat, with major economic dangers.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Homo Naledi"
programme.desc: Discovering in 2013, new and puzzling finding of small-skulled fossils of Homo naledi have scientists trying to understand whether Homo sapiens lived at the same time as Homo naledi, and how Homo naledi communities may have lived.

programme.title: Breakthrough S1 - "The Earliest Americans"
programme.desc: New evidence suggets humans arrived in North America far earlier than previously thoughtm and that they may have traveled along paths now buried deep beneath the sea.

programme.title: Science of Sound S1 - "Untrained Ears"
programme.desc: It’s no surprise that trained musicians experience music differently than others. Sure, musicians can hear and recognize similar chords or melodies across different songs, but is that all?

programme.title: Science of Sound S1 - "Developing Our Taste in Music"
programme.desc: In the era of music streaming, there are millions of songs at our fingertips. But in a world of near infinite music choices, music discovery and exposure have changed drastically.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "South Korea - Youth"
programme.desc: This time Magical Bones is in Seoul. He goes to the B-Boy championships and also visits his friend Ji and performs a spectacular trick on a shirt.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "Delhi"
programme.desc: In this episode Pete take to the streets of India’s capital city Delhi. He performs a series of fun and baffling tricks including a levitation attempt.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "Delhi & Mumbai"
programme.desc: Pete is in Delhi and Mumbai performing magic to a variety of people, including a baffling thirst quenching trick, as well as making rings and himself vanish!

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "Manchester"
programme.desc: Pete Heat checks out some of the trendiest bars in the Mumbai, meets a famous Bollywood artist and shows you how to perform your own piece of magic at home.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Human Propulsion"
programme.desc: Trisk skis can move a person quickly in the snow, but will he survive it?

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Invention War"
programme.desc: Can you improve on the inventions of Da Vinci? Matt and Jeremy aim to find out as they take four re-invented weapons from past episodes and rethink, redesign, and rebuild them using modern technology.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Snow Annihilator"
programme.desc: Bizarre way to remove snow from roads. Will it work or will it just be a mobile furnace?

programme.title: The Re-Inventors S2 - "Bulletproof Protection"
programme.desc: See how inventions from the First World War work.

programme.title: DRONERS S1 - "Extreme Droners"
programme.desc: Some drone pilots take their ‘quads’ to the extreme, building strange new designs, racing them in epic locations and building alternative communities.

programme.title: DRONERS S1 - "Droners Volcano Mission"
programme.desc: A team of daredevil DRONERS go on an epic mission to an active volcano to try and fly their drones inside a lava pit - all in the name of science.

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Juno , Cassini and Beyond"
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter. and New Horizons speeds on it its next encounter at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Slingshot"
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematician’s dream and an engineer’s nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination, we checkout the latest probes about to slingshot about the solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Living Planet"
programme.desc: With continuous observation of Earth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Cosmic collisions"
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Space Disasters"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the most prominent disasters in our journey through the cosmos, and what we learned from each set-back.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Why We Explore"
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli makes the case for space exploration.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Exoplanets"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the fascinating world of exoplanets.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Building and Testing Rockets"
programme.desc: Join Emily Calandrelli as she tours a 1 million square foot facility in Alabama that is manufacturing some of the world’s most powerful rockets.

programme.title: Space Dealers S1 - "Dealers on a Mission"
programme.desc: Larry takes on an impossible mission: he’s been asked to find an item worn in space by Apollo 15 legend Al Worden. Torie searches for Russian space items for a museum in San Francisco and Cole goes on the hunt for an item from Apollo 13.

programme.title: Space Dealers S1 - "Money Trouble"
programme.desc: Larry gets the offer of a lifetime: a Soviet era space suit. Torie pays big for an Apollo 11 artefact but it’s not what it seems. Cole meets Apollo 7 legend Walt Cunningham.

programme.title: Space Dealers S1 - "The Apollo Sale"
programme.desc: Torie’s son Jason joins her on the road. Larry turns ‘gastronaut’ when he comes across some space food; and a collector’s flash sale sees Cole bid for an Apollo 11 item with an incredible story.

programme.title: Space Dealers S1 - "Good Luck, Bad Luck"
programme.desc: Cole gets lucky when he finds a Russian space suit in an old box, but the gloves are missing. To find the gloves he has to strike a deal with Larry. Torie hears how Coke and Pepsi joined the space race and meets former NASA astronaut Winston Scott.

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Gravity"
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space-based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier S3 - "Interface"
programme.desc: The Ionosphere is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike, it changes between day and night and is influenced from space and from Earth, new satellites have been launched to study this zone.

programme.title: The New Frontier S4 - "The Cryosphere"
programme.desc: New satellites are being launched to continue detailed observations of Earth and its oceans an ice caps, They are finding that climate change is accelerating and they have the data to prove it.

programme.title: The New Frontier S4 - "Set Course for the Heart of the Sun"
programme.sub-title: Set Course for the Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission. No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us on Earth.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "The Wright Brothers: Bravery"
programme.desc: Just over 100 years ago, a pair of brothers looked at the sky and changed the world. They designed, built and flew the most ridiculous of inventions. How did two bicycle mechanics manage to succeed where the others had failed?

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Aircraft engines"
programme.desc: Kurtis learns about aircraft power plants from Penn Yan Aero’s Bill Middlebrook, whose family has a long and rich history in American aviation. Anthony shows that buying The Aviators’ new 210 can be just as simple as buying a used car. And accessorizing it can be just as fun. Raeleen celebrates women in aviation at the most female friendly airport in the world.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Antonov AN-2"
programme.desc: We take you flying in this classic Russian workhorse. Anthony gets hands-on with the revolutionary iPad tablet to show some of the most popular aviation tools available. A look at the future of commercial aviation… but who will be there to fly these things?

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Cessna 195"
programme.desc: Kurtis takes us up in the aircraft that’s a crowd favorite wherever it he takes it. We spend some time with an ever-growing group of people who use their planes as campers and for one week a year, the tower at Oshkosh’s Wittman Regional Airport becomes the busiest on the planet.

programme.title: The Aviators S3 - "WWII Pilot Training - T-6"
programme.desc: Kurtis earn his wings in a T-6 warbird at Stallion 51 Flight Operations in Kissimmee, FL!

programme.title: Rethink S1 - "How does sword swallowing work?"
programme.desc: In a world where nothing is what it seems, there is a lot to discover. Have you ever had an eye floater, let’s examine what they are and how often they happen. How does sword swallowing work and how to use Jump Cuts in video editing.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Glima - Bjørn Braathen"
programme.desc: Bjørn Braathen is a young man and a passionate Glima (Norwegian wrestling) champion. This is the Art of the Norwegian Vikings, the special forces of their time.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Shaolin Kung Fu - Kirby Koo"
programme.desc: Kirby Koo is a Shaolin Kung Fu Martial Artist and yoga teacher who lives in New York City and trains with Shi Yan Ming, a 34rd generation Shaolin warrior monk.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Kapap - Amit Himelstein"
programme.desc: Amit Himelstein is the head instructor of the IKF and the leader in Kapap. His big motto? Respect everyone but fear no-one. He’s the embodiment of krav maga.

programme.title: Power & S3 - "Kickboxing - Denise Kielholtz"
programme.desc: Denise Kielholtz is 6 time world champion kickboxer. Her goal? To become the world’s first female MMA world champion and will do anything to achieve this.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Future of Living Part 1"
programme.desc: Learn about future of living at the International Furniture Fair Cologne: vertical cities, new housing concepts & home innovations.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "The future of communication"
programme.desc: Check the future of communication and satellite connection to the Internet in all parts of the world, especially on cruise ships.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "High Tech Everyday"
programme.desc: With the technology we use daily, technology companies are trying to innovate and make their inventions more user-friendly in a digital and internet-connected world.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Future of Living Part 2"
programme.desc: Learn about trends and technologies in the smart kitchen, the digitization of living spaces and changes due to the pandemic and the home office.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S2 - "Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon"
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy? Will a shotgun blast really throw you back through a window? Can a single shot from a colt revolver break shackles?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S2 - "Terry's Underworld"
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale. Terry will attempt to shoot a circle around himself in the floor and fall through to save himself from the pack of werewolves.
